equipment.name: ZB vz. 26
equipment.notes: Czech-designed light machine gun widely used by German forces after the occupation of Czechoslovakia. The design directly influenced the British Bren gun.

equipment.name: Puşcă Mitralieră md. 1939 (ZB-30)
equipment.notes: Romanian-licence-produced ZB-30. Standard squad automatic weapon of the Romanian Army.

equipment.name: Mannlicher M1895 (Repetier-Gewehr M.95)
equipment.notes: World War I-era Austro-Hungarian rifle retained by successor states. Straight-pull bolt action allowed fast reloading. Still in service with minor Axis partners in 1939–45.
